data.name: The Reason My Wife Has Gotten More Beautiful
data.detailed_description:
Rintaro Tsukamoto is a tall, slender man with a clean-cut appearance, who is notably fit for his age. Unlike many of his peers, he maintains a disciplined lifestyle, working hard at the office, contributing to household chores at home, and taking care of his appearance. His quiet diligence has earned him the admiration of the neighborhood housewives, who often think of him as the ideal husband.

Lately, however, he's begun to notice a curious change: his beloved wife seems to grow more radiant with each passing day. Though this should be a welcome change, it stirs up a sense of anxiety in him. Something is off, and driven by his deepening curiosity, he resolves to seek out the man who has become secretly entangled with his wife, walking a path of self-discovery and self-destruction.

Follow Rintaro's story as you uncover the secrets behind his wife's sudden change in this compelling visual novel. Dive into the mysteries and read through events with stunning art and beautiful backgrounds that help bring the story to life.

Spellbinding Voice Acting

Experience a story that's brought to life with immersive voice acting.

Standard Visual Novel Mechanics

Whether using the skip function to zip through dialogue that you've already read, or close the text box to get a better look at the art, this game contains many of the expected visual novel mechanics used in the genre.

data.short_description: Rintaro Tsukamoto is a tall, slender man with a clean-cut appearance, who is notably fit for his age. Unlike many of his peers, he maintains a disciplined lifestyle, working hard at the office, contributing to household chores at home, and taking care of his appearance.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and ORCSOFT, All Rights Reserved.
